name: TRUTH-MD Pair Web
description: Multi-session WhatsApp bot. Users visit the site, enter their number, get a pairing code — bot connects instantly. No session ID needed.

BOT_NAME.description: Display name shown by the bot

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code, no + (e.g. 263771234567). Optional — bot works for all paired users without this.
